def correct_bracketing(brackets: str):
    """Given a sequence of '<' and '>' characters, it determines if the bracketing is correct by ensuring every opening bracket is matched.

    >>> correct_bracketing("<")
    False
    >>> correct_bracketing("<>")
    True
    >>> correct_bracketing("<<><>>")
    True
    >>> correct_bracketing("><<>")
    False
    """
